# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline
on: push
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Cache dependencies and outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules/**
            **/*.egg-info
            **/pip-selfcheck.json
            **/pip.conf
            **/.mypy_cache
            **/.pytest_cache
            **/.python**/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-deps-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-deps-
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install
        env:
          CI: true

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
